# Adam Buteux — Career Profile

## Professional Summary

Senior governance and privacy professional with 15+ years driving compliance programs at scale across Big Tech and consulting. Deep expertise in AI governance, privacy operations, regulatory risk management, and cross-functional program delivery. Proven track record of building enterprise privacy programs from the ground up and leading multi-workstream compliance initiatives that span product, legal, and engineering teams.

## Professional Experience

### Meta | Senior Manager, Privacy & Risk Review | June 2022–November 2025

Led enterprise AI risk review across Facebook, Instagram, and Messenger. Built the internal infrastructure to make 10 product teams capable of self-assessing risk before shipping. Redesigned the DMA compliance workflow across 10 product teams, cutting average regulatory response cycle from 21 to 12 days — a 40% reduction. Drove cross-functional alignment on privacy risk frameworks spanning AI governance, data minimization, and user consent architecture.

### Audible (Amazon) | Director, Privacy Operations | January 2019–May 2022

Oversaw global privacy program for 35M+ subscriber platform. Delivered data mapping and consent infrastructure 3 months early across 6 workstreams, achieving GDPR certification ahead of deadline. Managed privacy operations team supporting product, legal, and engineering stakeholders across US, EU, and APAC regions.

## Education

**Executive MBA** — Bayes Business School, London
**BSc Computer Science with Management** — King's College London

## Certifications

CISSP | CIPM
